title: bupleurum rigidum subsp. paniculatum
intro: Bupleurum rigidum subsp. paniculatum, also known as Chinese thorowax or Chinese kuding, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and improving digestion, as well as having antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. In herbal preparations, Bupleurum rigidum subsp. paniculatum is often used as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is commonly combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to enhance its therapeutic effects.
